headline: T-Mobile Targets Healthcare And Mission Critical Growth With 5G Push
summary: T-Mobile US (NasdaqGS:TMUS) is partnering with Cellhub and Extreme Networks on a healthcare-focused network solution that integrates wired, wireless, and cellular connectivity. The company is also launching the Siyata SD7 Ultra, a rugged 5G push to talk handset designed for mission critical communications in enterprise and public safety settings. T-Mobile US is best known for its consumer wireless business, but these moves point you toward where the company is trying to build more value,...
